prompt: Make the chorus feel more energetic — add more notes, higher velocities, and denser rhythms than the verse.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65
    v 80

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36
    v 80

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55
    v 70

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36
    v 90

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38
    v 85

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x
    n 42
    v 60

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p e e e e e e e e
    n 65 67 69 72 74 72 69 67
    v 110

  ch 2 Bass
    p e e e e e e e e
    n 36
    v 105

  ch 3 Chords
    p q e e q e e
    n 53 57 60
    v 95

  ch 4 Kick
    p q q q q
    n 36
    v 120

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38
    v 115

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x x
    n 42
    v 100

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly updated the chorus section with denser rhythmic patterns (e.g., 8th notes instead of quarter notes) and significantly higher velocities (100-120 range).
judgment.quality_reason: The musical choices effectively create a higher energy level in the chorus through driving 8th-note basslines, 4-on-the-floor kicks, and appropriately boosted velocities without being overwhelming.
